ad.meaning: movement to or toward; in addition to

examples: ammophila (a plant genus and a wasp genus)

amph.meaning: both, on both sides of, both kinds

ante.meaning: before, in front of, prior to; old

ap.meaning: off, away from, separate, at the farthest point

arct.meaning: Relating to the North Pole or the region near it; relating to cold

blast.meaning: germ, embryo, bud, cell with nucleus

cervic.meaning: relating to the neck, relating to the cervix

cis.meaning: on this side of, on the side nearer to the speaker (as opposed to trans-)

cosmet.meaning: the art of dress and ornament

ignorare.meaning: not to know, to be unacquainted; mistake, misunderstand

phalang.meaning: close formation of troops, finger bones

spond.meaning: a surety, guarantee; give assurance, promise solemnly
